meaning: n.冈比亚(非洲西部沿海一殖民地,1965年独立,首都Bathurst)
examples: They had recrossed the River Gambia by ferry.
It was the belief that he could find his "root" in Africa that made Alex Haley decide to go to Gambia.
She had to leave her native Gambia and her son.
International donors and lenders continue to be concerned about the quality of fiscal management and Gambia's debt burden.
What are the principal lessons learnt from these studies carried out in Senegal, Guinea-Bissau and Gambia?
